FORM 8-K

Item 1.01 Entry Into Material Definitive Agreement

Background of the Merger

The board of directors of Target Co. began considering strategic alternatives in late 2025 after receiving an unsolicited inbound expression of interest from a financial sponsor.

On January 2, 2026, Buyer A entered into a confidentiality agreement with Target Co. and was granted access to a virtual data room.

On February 14, 2026, Buyer A delivered a non-binding indication of interest valued at $25.50 per share, subject to confirmatory due diligence.

Bidding Activity

Bidder        Round 1     Round 2     Final
Buyer A       $24.00      $25.00      $25.50
Bidder X      $23.00      $24.50      withdrew
Bidder Y      $22.50      withdrew    -

Background of the Merger

Following the receipt of the revised proposal from Buyer A, the special committee retained outside legal counsel and an independent financial advisor to evaluate the transaction.

Exhibit 99.1
Form of Confidentiality Agreement
